title: Secure Plex Server Hardening
summary: Deployment and security hardening of a self-hosted Plex media server including firewall configuration, secure remote access, and service isolation.
tools: Linux, UFW Firewall, SSH Hardening, Port Forwarding, Plex Media Server
impact: Reduced exposed attack surface by closing unnecessary ports and enforcing secure remote access configurations.

title: Network Packet Analysis and Traffic Inspection
summary: Deep packet inspection and traffic trace analysis using Wireshark to identify protocol behavior, TCP handshake processes, and plaintext credential exposure.
impact: Detected insecure communications and proposed encryption and monitoring improvements to strengthen network visibility.

title: Controlled Exploitation Lab with Kali Linux
summary: Execution of controlled exploitation tests in a virtual lab environment using Kali Linux to identify vulnerabilities in intentionally vulnerable systems.
impact: Identified critical vulnerabilities and documented mitigation strategies to prevent privilege escalation and remote code execution.

title: Man-in-the-Middle Attack Simulation
summary: Simulation of Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) attacks within a controlled lab network to demonstrate credential interception and traffic manipulation risks.
tools: Kali Linux, Ettercap, ARP Spoofing, Wireshark
impact: Demonstrated risks of unencrypted protocols and validated mitigation through HTTPS enforcement and network segmentation.

title: Custom Port Scanner in Python
summary: Built a multi-threaded Python port scanner to identify open TCP ports and basic service banners within a controlled lab environment.
impact: Improved understanding of network reconnaissance techniques and demonstrated how open services increase attack surface.

title: Linux-Based Automated DDoS Detection with Real-Time Telegram Alerting
summary: Built a Python-driven monitoring solution on Linux to analyze web server logs and detect anomalous request thresholds indicative of potential DDoS activity, integrating automated mitigation and alerting workflows.
tools: Python, Linux, Nginx/Apache Logs, iptables, Service Control (systemctl), Telegram Bot API
impact: Enabled near real-time incident awareness and containment through automated IP blocking and Telegram-based security notifications, minimizing potential downtime in controlled attack simulations.
